case_title: CHRISTOPHER THOMAS HALLIQUIST VS. QLIQUE LABS INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALLIQUIST, CHRISTOPHER THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT QLIQUE LABS INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA RELEVVANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALLIQUIST, CHRISTOPHER THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QLIQUE LABS INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA RELEVVANT $16,806.25 PRINCIPAL, $25.81 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,202.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
